api.title: API Settings
api.hint: Configure your model service. Saved locally.
api.subtitle: Configure a model service. Columbina and Sandrone will use it to chat with you and judge status.

general.title: Settings
general.subtitle: Control desktop pet window, status bar, schedule bar, and basic audio preferences.
general.sidebarDesc: If accidentally closed, you can reopen from here.
general.tasksDesc: Control the right-side schedule/task display window.
general.musicDesc: Reserved background music switch and volume.
general.soundDesc: Reserved click, notification, and interaction sounds.
general.petAlwaysOnTopDesc: Only keep the pet on top; chat and sidebar windows are not pinned.
general.petVisibleDesc: Hide or show the Live2D desktop pet.
general.petZoomDesc: Adjust Live2D model size (0.5× ~ 2.0×); window scales with model.
general.uiThemeDesc: Default current appearance; dark is clearer; white is soft pearl white.
general.autoStartDesc: Automatically open Columbina when system starts.
general.chatHistoryDesc: Clear all local chat sessions. Migrate to Chat panel for per-session management.
general.languageDesc: Interface display language. Changes take effect immediately.
general.aboutDesc: Columbina v{{version}} · Lightweight Emotional Companion Desktop Agent

columbina.title: Columbina Settings
columbina.hint: Manage agent behavior, memory, RAG & permissions
columbina.subtitle: Manage Columbina's agent behavior, status updates, stickers, memory, and local retrieval capabilities.

runtimeSync.title: Status Bar Sync
runtimeSync.desc: Control how status and mood sync to the status bar.
runtimeSync.llmNote: LLM mode will make an additional model call per round, incurring extra token usage.

sticker.title: Sticker Sending
sticker.desc: Control whether Columbina sends stickers in chat and their display size.
sticker.thresholdHint: Lower = easier trigger; higher = more precise match

rag.title: RAG / Document Import
rag.desc: Select local retrieval models for file import, world book, and long-term memory recall.
rag.bgem3Desc: Great Chinese performance; supports sticker semantic matching and tone injection.
rag.rerankLightDesc: Fast reranking, ideal for casual chat; ~50ms per pair.
rag.rerankStandardDesc: Precise reranking for long documents and professional retrieval; ~200ms per pair.
rag.rerankOffDesc: No reranking; use retrieval results directly.
rag.placeholderNote: Buttons are UI placeholders; will support optional model installation, status checks, and document import retrieval later.

memory.title: Columbina Memory
memory.subtitle: Columbina's knowledge and memories about you. View, edit, and manage.
memory.autoHint: Manual edits take priority over auto-inferred content

l0.title: Long-term Profile
l0.desc: Information Columbina always remembers and rarely changes.

l1.title: Current Phase
l1.desc: Recent goals, preferences, and status that may change over time.

l2.title: Event Memory
l2.desc: Important events extracted from chat. Searchable and manageable.
l2.emptyHint: Columbina will automatically extract important information after chatting

imported.title: Imported Knowledge
imported.desc: Documents and knowledge bases uploaded by user.
imported.emptyHint: Files uploaded in the chat window will be auto-indexed

reflection.title: Phase Summary
reflection.emptyHint: Will be auto-generated after sustained chatting

user.title: My Info
user.subtitle: Your personal identification and cloud account (coming soon).
user.nicknamePlaceholder: What would you like Columbina to call you
user.callPreferencePlaceholder: e.g. Sweetie, Master (leave empty for nickname)
user.defaultCityPlaceholder: e.g. Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo (used for weather)
user.profileHint: This information tells Columbina what to call you and where you are. Default city is used for weather and other location-based tools.

chat.title: Chat
chat.subtitle: Manage chat window and session history.
chat.empty: No conversations yet. Click '+ New Chat' above to start.
chat.folderHint: All sessions are saved under userData/columbina-chats/ and can be migrated as a whole

tasks.title: Scheduled Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Manage auto-triggered agent tasks. Triggers at set time with prompt using currently allowed tools.
tasks.taskListHint: Task changes are saved immediately; no need to click the global save button.
tasks.empty: No scheduled tasks yet. Create a task to let Columbina run prompts on a schedule.
tasks.title: Title
tasks.promptPlaceholder: Prompt sent to LLM at trigger time
tasks.enabledHint: When off, the task won't auto-trigger but can still be run manually.
tasks.advancedToolLimitHint: When enabled, only the selected tools below will be available; still respects global plugin switches.
tasks.noToolHint: With no tools selected, the task can only use the model's own capabilities.

identity.title: Role
identity.subtitle: Customize Columbina's identity and responsibilities.
identity.placeholderHint: This feature will become available after multi-agent collaboration is added in a future release.

skills.title: Skills
skills.hint: Manage agent skill instructions (constrains tool usage)
skills.panelHint: Skills constrain how the agent uses tools. Place SKILL.md folders under skills/ in the user data directory to extend.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.subtitle: Manage Columbina's tool capabilities. Turning off prevents the scheduler from using that tool.

documentSearch.title: Document Search
documentSearch.desc: Search imported novels, materials, and knowledge snippets.

userMemory.title: User Memory
userMemory.desc: User profiles, phase memories, and semantic recall from chat history.

worldBook.title: World Book
worldBook.desc: On-demand recall of Columbina's background, experiences, and keyword content.

webSearch.title: Web Search
webSearch.desc: Search real-time web content (configure search source below).

weather.title: Weather
weather.desc: Check real-time weather and forecast for a specified city.

travel.title: 🚗 Travel
travel.desc: Route planning and estimated time for driving, walking, cycling, or transit.

email.title: Email
email.desc: Send emails via SMTP, with attachment support.

localFile.title: Local File
localFile.desc: Read-only: Columbina won't modify any local files.

multiDoc.title: Multi-Format Export
multiDoc.desc: Organize data into Excel/Word/PDF/Markdown, saved to desktop.

webScraping.title: Web Scraping
webScraping.desc: Download webpages and convert to structured Markdown for Columbina.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.desc: Track expenses, summarize, currency conversion (frankfurter, no config needed).

mcpTools.title: MCP Tools
mcpTools.desc: Registered MCP Server tools, auto-invoked as needed.

gameBot.title: Game Bot
gameBot.desc: Auto-run daily tasks via preset scripts.

playwright.title: Browser Automation (Playwright)
playwright.desc: Let her click web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, run UI flows.

lifeTools.title: Life Tools
lifeTools.desc: Handy daily utility tools, click to expand.

channels.title: Connect Phone
channels.hint: Connect Columbina to WeChat, Feishu, and other chat platforms.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.panelSubtitle: Please read and understand the following terms before using this software.

tokens.title: Token Usage
tokens.subtitle: View API call statistics & usage
tokens.noDataHint: Real token consumption will appear here after chatting with Columbina

chatWindow.title: Columbina · Chat
chatWindow.emptyTextCol: Columbina is looking forward to chatting with you ✨
chatWindow.emptyTextSan: Sandrone is looking forward to chatting with you ✨
chatWindow.placeholder: Say something… Enter to send / Shift+Enter for new line
chatWindow.ipcNotReady: Chat IPC not ready. Please restart the app and try again.
chatWindow.modelTimeout: Model response timed out. Please try again later.
chatWindow.attachment: (Attachment, content injected into this round's context)
chatWindow.fileHelpPrompt: Please help me review these files

call.title: Columbina · Voice Call
call.micAccessDenied: Cannot access microphone, please check permissions

settingsExtra.ttsDefaultStyle: Gentle, natural, with a slight warmth, like softly chatting with a user.

settingsExtra.mcpAddErrorMessage: An error occurred during the call. See terminal log for details.

placeholder.copy: This module is reserved. It will be expanded after the core chat and API integration are complete.
